requirements.summary: Build a single-page Thumbnail PNG Uploader UI with file picker, drag-and-drop, live preview, PNG validation, and upload confirmation
acceptanceCriteria: A file picker button and a drag-and-drop zone are both available for selecting a file
Only PNG files are accepted; selecting any other file type shows a clear error message
After selecting a valid PNG, a live preview of the image is displayed before upload
An upload/confirm button triggers the upload to the backend
A success state is shown after a successful upload, displaying the uploaded thumbnail
A delete/replace button allows the user to remove the current thumbnail and upload a new one
Only one thumbnail can be active at a time

file_operations.description: Create the main thumbnail uploader page with file picker button, drag-and-drop zone, PNG-only validation, live preview area, upload confirmation button, success state display, and delete/replace functionality. Use the blob-storage component (ExternalBlob.fromBytes with withUploadProgress) to handle file upload to backend. Call actor.uploadImage(blob) to upload and actor.getImage(id) to retrieve. Show clear error messages for non-PNG files. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add React Query hooks for thumbnail operations: useUploadImage (mutation calling actor.uploadImage with ExternalBlob), useGetImage (query calling actor.getImage by id), useDeleteImage (mutation calling actor.deleteImage by id), and useGetAllImages (query calling actor.getAllImages). Each hook should use useActor to obtain the backend actor. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Replace existing routes with a single route for ThumbnailUploadPage at the root path '/'. Remove all other page routes (Browse, Submit, Footage Detail, Admin Dashboard). Keep the shared Layout with Header and Footer but simplify navigation to only show the uploader. Update the HTML title to 'Thumbnail Uploader'.

Simplify the header to display 'Thumbnail Uploader' branding and the Internet Identity login/logout button. Remove all navigation links except for the logo/home link. Keep the authentication integration intact using useInternetIdentity hook as provided by the authorization component.

Simplify the footer to show basic branding 'Thumbnail Uploader', copyright notice, and the caffeine.ai attribution link. Remove mission statement and extra navigation links to maintain a minimal layout.
Update the HTML title tag from 'Car Editing Reels' to 'Thumbnail Uploader' to match the new application purpose.

requirements.summary: Apply a clean, minimal visual theme with light neutral background, generous whitespace, subtle rounded upload zone with dashed border, smooth drag-over highlight, and readable sans-serif typography across all UI states
acceptanceCriteria: Upload zone has a dashed border and visually highlights on drag-over
All states (idle, drag-over, preview, uploading, success, error) have distinct, consistent visual treatments
Typography is clean and readable with adequate contrast
Layout is centered and uncluttered on both desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Replace the current dark cinematic theme with a clean, minimal light theme. Define CSS custom properties for light neutral backgrounds (e.g., soft grays), subtle accent colors for highlights, and readable text colors with high contrast. Add utility classes for the dashed border upload zone, drag-over highlight state (e.g., border color change or subtle background shift), and generous spacing. Remove dark mode OKLCH tokens and replace with light theme equivalents. Keep Tailwind imports intact.

Update Tailwind configuration to support the minimal light theme. Replace amber/dark cinematic color tokens with light neutral colors (whites, light grays, soft blues or greens for accents). Configure readable sans-serif fonts (keep or replace Barlow with a system font stack if needed). Add custom utilities for dashed borders, rounded corners, and smooth transitions. Remove glow effects and dark theme-specific shadows, replacing them with subtle light shadows for depth.
